summary: Focana 2.0.0 introduces Session Builder, a structured way to enter a primary focus, optional subtasks, and next-up tasks before you start.
improvements: Added a collapsible Session Builder below the primary task field for optional subtasks and next-up tasks.
Running sessions now show plan details, let you check off subtasks individually, and reveal overflow plan items when space is tight.
Completing all subtasks now prompts you before closing the parent task, then hands off to the next top-level task without auto-starting it.
Structured task plans now persist through active sessions, session history, compact mode, and app restarts while preserving existing single-task labels.
Post-session breaks now support custom whole-minute durations from 1 to 240 minutes while keeping the existing quick presets.
fixes: Back to Break Mode now restores the prior break timer or quiet-logo state instead of ending the break.
Break timer clicks no longer stop the break countdown.
Re-entry flows from Session History and Parking Lot now restore the correct prompt state after modal round trips.
Floating drag smoke coverage now waits for the app to settle at the clamped edge before ending the drag.
